migration_policy: additive until 1.x; breaking changes require migration note, fixture update, backwards-compatibility decision, explicit reviewer approval
title: CC objective matrix
description: Registry of official exam domains/objectives. Workflow state (coverage_status), verification (verification_status), and confidence are three separate fields — the combined value 'seeded-verify' is forbidden.

outlines.description: Keyed by outline version (e.g. '2025-10' current, '2026-09' upcoming stub). The 2026-09 crosswalk lives only here (crosswalk_map), never on individual fact cards.

extensions.description: Cross-domain objective extensions such as global.ai-security.

weight.description: Current-outline weights must sum to exactly 1.0. Stub outlines may use weight_approx with tolerance ±0.02 and weights_confidence: approximate-needs-verification.

source_id.description: Validator-enforced join: must exist in reference/source-registry.json.

coverage_status.description: Workflow state: does content exist for this objective?

verification_status.description: Has the objective row been checked against the official outline?

confidence.description: How much to trust this row's accuracy.

volatility.description: Recheck cadence hint: stable (CIA triad), transitioning (current-vs-2026 outline mapping), emerging (AI service accounts, post-quantum crypto).

content_status.description: Coverage is not mastery: content_status tracks existence only; validation_status tracks provenance; learning_status (learner performance) lives in the learner-state layer.
